maxSlots.description: slot 0 is the reserved shared baseline; tickets get 1..maxSlots-1

reservedSlot0.description: Display name for the reserved slot 0 baseline

ticketPattern.description: Regex a ticket id must match. Use Jira-style ^[A-Z]+-[0-9]+$ if desired.

sessionPrefix.description: Prefix for tmux sessions and docker compose project names

seed.description: Project-wide files/dirs to copy into every fresh worktree (gitignored artifacts)

to.description: Destination relative to the worktree path

overwrite.description: Copy even if destination exists (default: skip if present)

tag.description: Optional label so the CLI can skip a group (e.g. --skip-seed agent)

repo.description: Path to the main repo, relative to project root

ports.description: Named base ports. Actual port = base + slot.

seed.description: Files/dirs to copy into this component's worktree on create (e.g. .claude, certs)

installMarker.description: Dir/file whose presence means deps are installed (e.g. node_modules)

start.description: Start command template (run in worktree via tmux)

file.description: compose file path relative to component repo
env file path relative to worktree

template.description: Fallback template to copy when file is missing/incomplete

set.description: Key -> value template pairs to force-write

requiredKeys.description: If any is missing, env file is re-hydrated from template

runtime.description: managed = wtm runs it; guide = wtm prepares worktree and prints manual steps

health.description: Port template to check for liveness after start

guide.description: Manual run steps printed when runtime=guide
